chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI JCM No. 36 of 2011 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders as to maintainability of CMA No. 266/2014. 2. For hearing of Main Petition. 19.03.2026. None present. ********** None present on behalf of the Petitioner nor has any intimation been received. It appears that this matter has been pending for over 15 years without any significant progress. It appears that the Petitioner has lost interest in pursuing the matter Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE AYAZ
